recommendations.title: The Burning Plain
recommendations.overview: A trailer is burning in the middle of a plain. The bodies of two adulterous lovers are found. Scenes from both families, before and after the dramatic events, suggest an unusual connection between them. But what is their secret?

recommendations.title: Goodbye Mr. Loser
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged loser travels back in time to his high school years to put his life on the right track.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys I've Loved Before
recommendations.overview: Lara Jean's love life goes from imaginary to out of control when her secret letters to every boy she's ever fallen for are mysteriously mailed out.

recommendations.title: Guava Island
recommendations.overview: Deni Maroon, a musician and dock worker is determined to pull off a music festival against the interests of the local factory owner.

recommendations.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Time Travel
recommendations.overview: Follows three social outcasts -- two geeks and a cynic -- as they attempt to navigate a time-travel conundrum in the middle of a British pub.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Atlantics
recommendations.overview: Arranged to marry a rich man, young Ada is crushed when her true love goes missing at sea during a migration attempt — until a miracle reunites them.

recommendations.title: 18 Years Old and Rising
recommendations.overview: Primo is an ordinary middle-class youngster studying for his baccalaureate, who gets side-tracked when he falls in love with a rich girl. They soon learn they have to deal with her condescending friends who look down upon this upstart.

recommendations.title: Tramps
recommendations.overview: A young man and woman find love in an unlikely place while carrying out a shady deal.

recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.
